configurations.name: Dense Only
configurations.description: Dense vector retrieval, no BM25, no reranker, no section filter

configurations.name: Dense + BM25 (no reranker)
configurations.description: Hybrid retrieval, no reranker, no section filter

detailed_results.question: What is the upper bound on the query complexity for estimating an irreducible representation matrix element πλ(g)i,j under the PAC learning criterion?
Which mathematical duality is used in the proof of Proposition 8 to decompose tensor products of unitary representations?
What is the role of the partial transpose operation in the proof of Proposition 8?
What are the two subsections of Section 5 and what does each address?
What is the formula for G(α, d) and how is it computed using properties of the Haar measure?
What does Schur's orthogonality relation imply about the L2 norm of an irreducible representation matrix element πλ(g)i,j?
What BLEU scores did the Transformer achieve on the WMT 2014 English-to-German and English-to-French translation tasks?
How does the training cost of the Transformer base model compare to GNMT+RL on the English-to-German task?
What effect does reducing the attention key size dk have on model quality according to the ablation study?
What are the PPL and BLEU scores of the big Transformer model and how does its configuration differ from the base model?
What F1 score did the 4-layer Transformer achieve on English constituency parsing in the semi-supervised setting?
What overall architecture does the Transformer use for both encoder and decoder?
How does the auto-regressive property of the Transformer decoder work at each generation step?
What is the key architectural distinction of the Transformer compared to previous encoder-decoder sequence transduction models?
What future research directions do the Transformer authors plan to pursue?
What are the three advantages of pre-training listed in the survey?
What two shallow architectures did Mikolov et al. propose for building word embeddings?
What was the first successful PTM for NLP and what initialization strategy did it use?
Why does the Transformer require a large training corpus despite becoming the mainstream architecture for PTMs?
What is self-supervised learning and how does the masked language model exemplify it?
What are the three key factors to consider when choosing a PTM for a downstream task?
What is sequential transfer learning and how does adapting PTMs to downstream tasks fit this definition?
What types of multi-modal PTMs does the survey describe and what pre-training tasks do they typically use?
What exiting strategy does PABEE use and how does it differ from entropy-based approaches?
What are the two long-context domains in which MemGPT is evaluated?
What accuracy improvement does adding MemGPT provide to GPT-3.5 Turbo on the Deep Memory Retrieval task?
What is the nested key-value retrieval task and what capability does it test?
What are the context window sizes for GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, and GPT-3.5 Turbo as used in the MemGPT experiments?
How does MemGPT's performance on the document QA task compare to truncation-based approaches as document length increases?
What are the two primary memory types in MemGPT's OS-inspired architecture and what are their analogues in operating systems?
What are the three components of MemGPT's main context and how does function chaining enable multi-step retrieval?
How does MemGPT manage its own memory without user intervention?
